Exec Summary

≈≈≈

A once-in-a-lifetime family gathering to celebrate the grandparents and enjoy time together across four generations — from the skyline of Singapore to a private villa above the Indian Ocean.

The Line buffet at Shangri-La — international spread across interactive show kitchens

Mandai Wildlife Reserve — day zoo or famous night safari.

Main Pool
16m × 5m

40 Mbps

Private chef, butlers, housekeepers & security — all included

Two 9-seater vans for airport transfer on arrival

6-seater car at USD 45++ / 8 hrs (excl. petrol)

BBQ & teppanyaki · 85" media room · spa room (massage extra)

Baby cot, high chair, board games, floaties & toys available

Fruit basket, welcome drinks & nightly turndown

A Glimpse Inside

Built as a multi-generational family home by celebrated Balinese architect Popo Danes — Shanti means peace in Sanskrit. A fitting name for four generations together.

View the full villa gallery →

Bali Itinerary

≈≈≈

Ten days, balancing big adventures with restful villa time. Tap any day to expand. Driver Mus is available most days alongside the villa driver.

1Sun

Arrival & Settle In

Flight arrives 12:00 · villa check-in · gentle evening

▾

Vans meet you at Ngurah Rai. If early check-in isn't ready, lunch at Paradisus; otherwise light sandwiches at the villa. Late afternoon — open the bubbles and toast to Grandma & Grandad. 🥂

Light villa lunch · villa dinnerVilla pickup
2Mon

Nusa Dua Explore

Bali Collection · cycling · beach · Waterblow

▾

Explore local Nusa Dua — the Bali Collection shops, hire bikes, the beach, and the dramatic Waterblow geyser. Evening at Bumbu Bali for authentic local cuisine.

Villa lunch · Bumbu Bali dinnerVilla driver 9–5 · Mus 11–9
3Tue

Waterbom Water Park

Kuta · 9am–6pm · ~30 min drive

▾

Asia's top-rated water park. Book ahead — IDR 7.2m for the group beats the gate price. Tie in with Bali Green Spa or a meal in Kuta on the way home.

Lunch out · villa dinnerMus 8–6 + friend / taxi
4Wed

Free Day

Massages · pool · beaches · beach clubs

▾

A true rest day. In-villa massages, Green Spa, local beaches, paragliding from the clifftop (4 min walk!), or afternoon beach-club drinks. Choose your own adventure.

Villa or outVilla driver 9–5 · Mus 11–9
5Thu

Free Day

Adults' afternoon out · GG babysit

▾

Flexible. Possible plan: Nick, Claire, Elliot, Laura, Luke & Viv head out for afternoon drinks while Ian & Sandra take grandparent duty at the villa.

FlexibleVilla driver 9–5 · Mus 11–9
6Fri

Ubud Day Trip

Hidden Canyon · Monkey Forest · Family Hangout · waterfalls

▾

Early start for the ~1.5hr drive. Route: Hidden Canyon → Monkey Forest → Bali Family Hangout (kids play, parents relax in the café) → optional waterfalls (Poh Gading & Sumampan) on the way back. Jazz Festival from 4:30 if timing fits.

Family Hangout lunch · villa dinnerMus 8–6 + friend · two cars
7Sat

Free Day

Possible Grand Hyatt day pass · pool

▾

Flexible. Consider a Grand Hyatt Bali day pass for a change of scene and pools, or another beach club / spa session.

FlexibleVilla driver 9–5 · Mus 11–9
8Sun

Sundays Beach Club

Private beach · watersports · sunset bonfire

▾

The number-one excursion. Arrive late morning to dodge the heat and stay for the famous sunset bonfire & marshmallows. ASADO BBQ every Sunday 2–6pm. Under-5s free.

Sundays ASADO lunch & dinnerTaxi + Mus 10–8

Pass IDR 800k adult (500k credit) · 400k child (250k credit) · under 5 free.

9Mon

Uluwatu & Kecak Fire Dance

Temple · clifftop lunch · sunset dance

▾

Iconic culture day. Uluwatu Temple from 9:30, clifftop lunch at Malini or Single Fin, afternoon at GWK Park / Jimbaran, then the Kecak Fire Dance at 6pm — book ahead.

Malini clifftop lunch · villa dinnerMus 9–8 + friend

Kecak IDR 180k adult · 95k child · GWK 150–250k (under 100cm free).

10Tue

Free Day + BBQ Night

Last full day · villa BBQ with suckling pig

▾

Soak up the villa one last time — pools, massages, leisurely packing. Evening: a big villa BBQ with the chef, suckling pig and all, to celebrate the final night together. 🐷

Villa/out lunch · villa BBQ dinnerVilla driver 9–5 · Mus 11–9
11Wed

Check-Out

Morning pool · pack · transfer to airport

▾

Morning by the pool, then pack. Villa transfers to Ngurah Rai for SQ939 at 13:15 → Singapore (arr. 16:00). Overnight at Crowne Plaza Changi.

Villa breakfastVilla transfer to airport

Research & Ideas

≈≈≈

Beach Clubs & Beaches

🏖️

Sundays Beach Club

The #1 pick. Private beach, very family-friendly, sunset bonfire.

🍹

Azul Beach Club

Infinity pool, daybeds, two-level open-air restaurant with sunset views.

🎵

Potato Head, Seminyak

Free before 4:30pm, live music, big open space for kids. 1hr away — a whole-day thing.

🌅

Geger Beach

4km away. Softer, quieter, more premium — good for a lazy beach day.

Activities

🏌️

Bukit Panda Golf

Championship par-3 · 6 min from villa · ~2hr round.

🪂

Paragliding

A 4-minute walk away — cliff launch over the Indian Ocean.

🛕

Uluwatu + Kecak

Clifftop temple and the iconic fire dance at sunset.

🌿

Ubud Day Trip

Rice terraces, jungle, temples — 1.5hrs each way.

Dining to Remember

🕯️

The Cave Bali

Chef Ryan Clift — unique dining inside a cave.

🥂

Kayuputi, St. Regis

High-end beachfront dining.

🌇

Sundara, Four Seasons

A great sunset dinner spot in Jimbaran.

🐟

Jimbaran Bay Seafood

Beach seafood at sunset — a classic group night out.

What's Everyone Most Excited For?

Tap your top picks and watch the family favourites rise. Once the shared store is switched on, everyone's votes sync live across devices.

Good to Know — Bali

💵

Cash & cards

Rupiah is king with small vendors — carry cash. ATMs are common; cards work at hotels, clubs & bigger restaurants.

📶

Staying connected

Grab an eSIM (Airalo) before you fly, or a local Telkomsel SIM at the airport. Villa will have Wi-Fi.

🛕

Temple dress

Shoulders covered and a sarong & sash at temples — usually provided at the entrance (Uluwatu included).

🚗

Getting around

A private driver (Mus) is easiest for days out. Grab & Gojek apps work for short hops and food.

🚰

Water & sun

Drink bottled water only (incl. brushing teeth). Sun is strong — reef-safe SPF and hats for the kids.

🙏

Tipping & etiquette

Rounding up or ~5–10% is appreciated; some places add service. Use your right hand; a smile goes a long way.

Kids' Bali Bingo
